---
id: generate-data-link-upload-url-with-path
title: "Generate data-link file upload URL (to given path)"
description: "Creates a URL to upload files to the data-link associated with the given data-link identifier, specifying a file path (`dirPath`). For AWS S3 data-links, send a follow-up request to the `/upload/finish` endpoint after your file upload completes or fails to finalize the upload."
sidebar_label: "Generate data-link file upload URL (to given path)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate data-link file upload URL (to given path)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/data-links/{dataLinkId}/upload/{dirPath}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a URL to upload files to the data-link associated with the given data-link identifier, specifying a file path (`dirPath`). For AWS S3 data-links, send a follow-up request to the `/upload/finish` endpoint after your file upload completes or fails to finalize the upload.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./generate-data-link-upload-url-with-path.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
